examples: Process for preparing pyridazinone derivatives, and insecticidal, acaricidal, nematicidal, fungicidal compositions.
Five strains with strong nematicidal activity were obtained in the analysis with the fermentation liquid extract of some isolates.
Nematicidal activity of aloperine, cytisine, N methylcytisine and matrine was bioassayed by the agar medium method and the cotton ball method.
